How To Claim
Users can claim rewards along their holding balances.
CONNECT WALLET
To claim rewards, connect wallet such as TonKeeper, OpenMask and so on.
CHECK
Make sure you have a reward voucher in your wallet.
Confirm
Sign in your wallet.
FAQ
Here you'll find answers to the questions we get asked the most often
What is TonFOR?
TonFOR is a decentralized cryptocurrency, the distribution of which is taking place through PoW-mechanism based on The Open Network Blockchain (TON).
Fees
TonFOR charges some fees. They can be nominated in TON or in the issued tokens depending on the pool. Fees help to maintain service or to provide liquidity on the market.
